deny-gh.description: Blocks all GitHub CLI invocations, including the bare gh command.

deny-gh-repo-delete.description: Blocks GitHub repository deletion with gh repo delete.
deny-gh-repo-delete.shell: CMD=$(printf '%s' "$PI_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] || bash-deny -r 'gh repo delete' -i "$CMD" -q

deny-gh-pr-merge.description: Blocks pull-request merges with gh pr merge.
deny-gh-pr-merge.shell: CMD=$(printf '%s' "$PI_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] || bash-deny -r 'gh pr merge' -i "$CMD" -q

deny-gh-release-delete.description: Blocks GitHub release deletion with gh release delete.
deny-gh-release-delete.shell: CMD=$(printf '%s' "$PI_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] || bash-deny -r 'gh release delete' -i "$CMD" -q

deny-gh-api-delete.description: Blocks DELETE requests sent by gh api with --method.
deny-gh-api-delete.shell: CMD=$(printf '%s' "$PI_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] || bash-deny -r 'gh api --method DELETE' -i "$CMD" -q

deny-gh-api-delete-long-equals.description: Blocks DELETE requests sent by gh api with --method=DELETE.

deny-gh-api-delete-short.description: Blocks DELETE requests sent by gh api with -X.
deny-gh-api-delete-short.shell: CMD=$(printf '%s' "$PI_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] || bash-deny -r 'gh api -X DELETE' -i "$CMD" -q

deny-gh-api-delete-short-equals.description: Blocks DELETE requests sent by gh api with -X=DELETE.

deny-gh-destructive.description: Blocks destructive GitHub CLI operations: repository deletion, pull-request merge, release deletion, and DELETE API requests.
